reasoning: The control 3.13.15 focuses on protecting the authenticity of communication sessions, which in the Kubernetes context can be mapped to ensuring secure communication channels. This includes enabling TLS for Ingress controllers to secure external traffic, ensuring mutual TLS (mTLS) is enabled in service meshes for internal service-to-service communication, enabling TLS for the API server to secure communication with the Kubernetes control plane, and ensuring etcd uses TLS to protect data in transit.
title: 3_13_15: 3.13.15 Protect the authenticity of communications sessions
